headline: France Blocks Polymarket: 12 ISPs Comply Immediately

article.title: French gambling regulator orders ISPs to block Polymarket
article.summary: France’s gambling authority has ordered the country’s internet service providers to geoblock Polymarket, citing illegal gambling and market manipulation concerns.

headline: FTX Pays $900M to Creditors in Fifth Disbursement

article.title: FTX to distribute $900M to creditors in fifth payment round
article.summary: The FTX Recovery Trust and company have distributed about $10 billion since the exchange filed for bankruptcy in November 2022, leaving users cut off from their funds.

headline: China Demands Clarity on Indonesia's $10B Mining Laws

article.title: China Seeks Stable, Transparent Mineral Rules From Indonesia
article.summary: China said it hopes Indonesia can provide a stable and transparent policy environment for its mineral sector, as the two countries deepen economic ties.

headline: Kuwait Stocks Plunge 5% Amid Iranian Attacks

article.title: Kuwait Faces Intense Night of Iranian Attacks as Power Plant Hit
article.summary: Kuwait suffered one of its worst nights of Iranian retaliatory attacks since the conflict in the Middle East began, with a second power plant hit in as many days and flights suspended.
